name: ClickHouse
tagline: Query and manage ClickHouse Cloud services
description: Query and manage ClickHouse Cloud services. This official ClickHouse MCP integration is installable through Cline.

env.name: CLICKHOUSE_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN
env.description: Bearer token required when exposing ClickHouse MCP over HTTP or SSE.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: stdio by default; HTTP/SSE supported. Auth from source catalog: ClickHouse credentials; HTTP/SSE requires bearer token/OAuth unless disabled locally. Official ClickHouse GitHub repo; connects to ClickHouse cluster and supports chDB.
